2026-0227
2026-03-13JUSPublic Service Employment ActReapointment of the special adviser to the Minister of Justice, to be styled Federal Ombudsperson for Victims of CrimeReappointment of Benjamin Roebuck of Ottawa, Ontario, as special adviser to the Minister of Justice, to be styled Federal Ombudsperson for Victims of Crime, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective April 24, 2026.N/A
subject: Reapointment of the special adviser to the Minister of Justice, to be styled Federal Ombudsperson for Victims of Crime
precis: Reappointment of Benjamin Roebuck of Ottawa, Ontario, as special adviser to the Minister of Justice, to be styled Federal Ombudsperson for Victims of Crime, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective April 24, 2026.
